scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "!./artifacts/mockup-sandbox" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck

dependencies.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
dependencies.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
dependencies.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
